metadata.entity_build: processed-entities/2026-07-20/entities-20260720-0106.json (232 entities, 6th carry-forward, cycles 222800+233400, 14 critical/108 priority/110 normal). Finalized 01:06 MYT 20 Jul. Supersedes the 230-entity 2225 build used by rev16. +2 new entities, 3 context updates. QUIET / LOW-YIELD cycle (World Cup final dominated overnight). NEW ENTITIES: (1) Bersatu Johor-wipeout-repeat framing [PIR-06 PRIORITY] - FMT EN Khaled Johor-as-precedent; (2) Loke baptism of fire [PIR-07 normal] - Newswav analytical framing. No new [CRITICAL] threshold crossed (18th consecutive cycle). All 13 [CRITICAL] PIR-06 entities UNCHANGED.
metadata.prior_revision: revision-16 (2026-07-20T06:25:00+08:00, 239 entities, 13 critical/53 priority/173 none), built on the 230-entity 2225 build
metadata.score_convention: SIGNED (-1.0 to +1.0). Negative = -1.0 to < -0.20; Neutral = -0.20 to +0.20 (marginal/mixed band); Positive = > +0.20 to +1.0.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp sentiment shift >30% change for any PIR-06 entity; Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal = [CRITICAL]. PIR-16 CRITICAL if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR Bersatu-attributed 'sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri'.
metadata.election_context: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 - Campaign Day 2 (Nomination 18 Jul; Day-1 19 Jul; Day-2 20 Jul). Polling 1 Aug; early voting 28 Jul; BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi + Pertang); PH manifesto launch 20 Jul (Amirudin Shari, Klana Resort). Electorate 889,490 (103 candidates, 36 seats; simple-majority threshold 19).
metadata.director_cycle: 19 Jul 17:25 MYT (4th carry-forward) - 6th entity carry-forward (233400 cycle)

entities.rationale: rev13 -0.90 -> rev14 -0.92. SIXTH converging [CRITICAL] trigger: Khaled Nordin (Umno VP/Defence Minister) 4-publisher 'Pastikan Bersatu KO habis-habis' + 'kacau daun' (NST+BH+Metro+FMT 23:49-00:16 MYT) — FIRST BN-VP-level hard-news call for Bersatu's ELECTORAL ELIMINATION. Plus 153300 'Bersatu now sole opposition party' (The Vibes 18 Jul) self-positioning. Now 6 triggers: lebih-hebat, sasar-kerajaan solo 24-seat, PN-toksik, quorum+RoS, Hamzah rebuke, Khaled elimination call. Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal CONFIRMED -> [CRITICAL].

rev13 -0.86 -> rev14 -0.88. SEVENTH trigger: Khaled 'KO habis' + 'kacau daun' hard-news 4-publisher. 24 own-logo seats + lebih-hebat + sasar-kerajaan + PN-toksik + quorum + Hamzah rebuke + Khaled elimination. Bersatu sharp-negative internal-fracture signal CONFIRMED -> [CRITICAL].

rev13 -0.88 -> rev14 -0.89. Khaled (BN VP) elimination call adds a BN-voice to the 3-sided fracture (Bersatu vs PAS/Wawasan vs PN-MT, now + BN-VP anti-Bersatu). Intra-opposition + intra-coalition warfare.

rev13 -0.89 -> rev14 -0.90. Khaled 'KO habis' electoral-elimination rhetoric pushes toward removal trajectory (BN-VP voice). Formal PN-MT expulsion notice STILL NOT issued (11th consecutive pass). Trajectory: pre-threshold; most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER 1 Aug poll.

Carried rev13. Muhyiddin (Sinar 17 Jul + BH + Metro + MalaysiaGazette + Newswav + Buletin TV3): NEW 'lebih hebat' coalition after PRN NS. >50% viral amplification fires. No formal launch 18-19 Jul — remains hint/bayangan stage. PRU16 realignment vehicle.

Carried rev13. Kiandee (11 Jul) vs Radzi (11 Jul): disputed baseline 49 vs 23 MPT members, Clause 13.12. Sanjeevan frames 'alasan sekat Bersatu bertanding'. Dispute CONTESTED not resolved. Director-designated [CRITICAL].

'Pastikan BERSATU di NS KO habis' — urges voters reject Bersatu so all 24 lose deposits, paving way for BN straight fights next PRU. Director PIR-06 keywords 'keluar/pecat/tarik diri' = coalition-membership actions; THIS is electoral-elimination rhetoric by a BN (not PN) leader — adjacent but NOT formal PN-MT expulsion/withdrawal. entities.entity: Aminuddin small-group campaign style (caretaker no advantage)
entities.rationale: NEW. Aminuddin (Metro 16:47 MYT): prefers small-group campaigning (2-3 people) at Linggi — 'sejak 2008 saya berkempen macam ini.' Explicitly states caretaker MB status gives NO advantage: 'MB pun sekarang dah dipanggil caretaker saja... saya tidak boleh buat apa-apa keputusan.' Acknowledges Linggi traditionally BN stronghold. Positive Indian voter reception at Pekan Pasir Panjang. Director 'fleeing Sikamat' adjacent. [PRIORITY].

NEW. Loke (NST+FMT 16:03) defends MB Aminuddin as PH MB-retention candidate: 'done nothing wrong, not corrupt, not abused position, humble, willing to work with everyone.' 'PH inclusive — represents all races.' Frames PH as seeking fresh mandate to retain Aminuddin as MB. Counter to BN-PN 'stability/Malay-unity' — PH's pitch = incumbent-performance continuity + inclusive governance. [PRIORITY].

entities.entity: PM discretion on minister appointments (hak mutlak PM / budi bicara PM)
entities.rationale: NEW rev15. Khaled Nordin (Umno VP/Defence Minister) BN counter-line to the resign-narrative, now 4-outlet corroborated via the 182000 cycle (Awani BM 23:36 + NST EN 23:44 + BH BM 23:45 + FMT BM 16:04 MYT 19-20 Jul). At the Johol BN machinery launch: 'PM alone decides ministers' fate' / 'urusan lantikan serta kedudukan seorang menteri... hak mutlak Perdana Menteri' / 'budi bicara PM' / 'kalau orang dah tak suka, buat apa nak tunggu.' Frames ministerial tenure as exclusive PM prerogative - deflects AMH/AMK resign-demand ('dia cakaplah dengan ketua parti dia') and implicitly jabs Tok Mat 'ready to resign'. Stabilizing/containment framing within the coalition-cohesion frame; mildly negative as a partisan deflection of an accountability demand. NOT a formal PN-MT expulsion/withdrawal/quorum signal => [PRIORITY] not [CRITICAL]. Quiet-corroboration cycle; no escalation threshold crossed.

NEW rev15. Cross-partisan convergence on clean, policy-focused campaigning now spans FOUR leaders: Loke (PH, NST+BH+Metro 'campaign on policies not personal attacks') + Anwar (PM, NST 14:47 'resign to attack unity partners' firewall) + Khaled Nordin (BN/Umno VP, NST EN + BH BM + FMT BM, 23:44-23:45/16:04: 'PRN NS seharusnya memberi tumpuan kepada isu berkaitan pembangunan negeri... bukannya medan serangan antara parti') + Zahid Hamidi (BN/Umno president, referenced by Khaled: 'Seperti ditekankan Presiden UMNO... kempen perlu dijalankan secara berhemah'). Counters the 'derhaka'/personal-attack + resign-narrative friction. A de-escalation / norms-strengthening signal across the partisan divide. [PRIORITY PIR-16] - multi-leader convergence. Quiet-corroboration cycle; the convergence firms up but no viral amplification >50% this cycle.

NEW rev16 (5th carry-forward, 212300 cycle). Umno Secretary-General (Zambry Abd Kadir, former Perak MB). Cross-surfaced via the mandatory 'Bersatu sole opposition Muhyiddin' gnews query. Zambry (BN/Umno Sec-Gen) met Samsuri (PN chairman / Terengganu MB) in PORT DICKSON — an NS constituency (N.05, Director PIR-06 Tier-4 seat). FIRST explicit Tier-4-seat (N.05) leadership-meeting intel: a PIR-06 cooperation signal on Tier-4 turf. Pre-dates the 19 Jul Hamzah 'gabung jentera' machinery merger (18:29 MYT) — this is the POLITICAL-LEADERSHIP-LEVEL BN-PN pact confirmation (Zambry=BN sec-gen <-> Samsuri=PN chairman), distinct from the operational/grassroots machinery merger. Score +0.22 (marginal positive; single-source headline-intel, cooperation-vector). [PRIORITY] (not [CRITICAL]) — cooperation-hardening signal, NOT a fracture signal. Reinforces BN-PN pact; does NOT cross the [CRITICAL] threshold (which requires 'pecat/keluar/tarik diri/toxic PN/kuorum/lebih hebat' entity). Adds N.05 to the active Tier-4 watch set.

NEW rev16 (5th carry-forward, 212300 cycle). Newswav gnews headline-intel (18 Jul 09:22 MYT): 'BN-PN pact comes alive in Port Dickson as Zambry, Samsuri meet.' Leadership-level BN-PN pact confirmation on NS soil — Zambry (Umno Sec-Gen / BN) <-> Samsuri (PN chairman / Terengganu MB) meeting in PORT DICKSON (N.05, Director PIR-06 Tier-4 seat). First explicit Tier-4-seat (N.05) leadership-meeting intel: a PIR-06 cooperation signal on Tier-4 turf. Pre-dates and pre-figures the 19 Jul 4-stage BN-PN formalization trajectory (seat-swap -> gabung jentera machinery merger -> manifesto bersepadu -> kongsi pentas joint ceramah). The Zambry-Samsuri PD meeting is the POLITICAL-LEADERSHIP tier of that trajectory — the precursor that enabled the operational tiers that followed. Adds a 5th Tier-4 seat (N.05) to the active-watch set (N.04/05/13/14/23/25/31/34). Score +0.30 (positive, cooperation-hardening narrative, single-source headline-intel; improving trend as it pre-figures the formalization trajectory). [PRIORITY] (not [CRITICAL]) — cooperation-hardening, NOT a coalition-fracture signal. The [CRITICAL] flag (Kiandee quorum escalation) remains MAINTAINED on the FRACTURE vector; this is the COUNTER-vector (BN-PN pact strengthening).

NEW rev17 (6th carry-forward, 0106 build, 233400 cycle). FMT EN (07:12 MYT 20 Jul, gnews headline-intel; FMT direct URL not curl-recoverable — 404 across 10 category/day guesses; gnews protobuf still curl-unresolvable, 18th cycle). Khaled Nordin frames the targeted NS Bersatu wipeout as a REPEAT of Bersatu's Johor state-election result (where Bersatu was wiped out). Prior 'KO habis' captures (NST EN + Utusan BM + BH BM + Awani BM, 171500) used 'KO habis'/'knocked out' but did NOT explicitly name the Johor precedent — FMT is the first to make the Johor-as-precedent framing explicit. Reinforces the PIR-06 electoral-elimination vector (BN VP publicly urging Bersatu's electoral destruction while BN operationally cooperates with Bersatu's coalition partners via PN). Director PIR-06 keywords 'keluar'/'pecat'/'tarik diri'/'kuorum'/'lebih hebat' are about coalition-membership actions; this is electoral-elimination rhetoric by a BN (not PN) leader — adjacent, NOT [CRITICAL]. [PRIORITY PIR-06].

entities.entity: Loke baptism of fire (Chennah battle, Newswav)
entities.rationale: NEW rev17 (6th carry-forward, 0106 build). Newswav (18 Jul 16:30 MYT, gnews headline-intel; pre-cutoff / nomination-day). Newswav frames Anthony Loke's Chennah defense as a 'baptism of fire' in the NS polls. Chennah = the only MCA-DAP straight fight (Loke PH/DAP sec-gen vs Siow Kong Choon MCA/BN); 47.8% Malay (up from 44% in 2018), 6.3% Orang Asli, 42.6% Chinese; PH vote dropped to 44% by PRU15 vs BN+PN combined 56% -> if PRU15 pattern repeats Loke LOSES (mkini 780075 full text). The 'baptism of fire' framing reinforces the PIR-16 'MCA biggest loser' / Loke-under-pressure narrative and the PIR-07 marquee-battleground status of Chennah. [normal PIR-07] — analytical framing, not a hard-news development.
